focus_points.label: How she frames and proves her impact
focus_points.reason: What she’s using as the performance bar for Senior-level impact, and where she thinks her current framing might be underweighting influence and visibility.

focus_points.label: Cross-functional friction and stakeholder trust
focus_points.reason: How she’s handling cross-functional friction right now—whether she’s pre-wiring expectations, escalating hard news early, and building trust when outcomes depend on others.

focus_points.label: Raising visibility with stakeholders
focus_points.reason: Whether she has a practical plan to raise signal with stakeholders (updates, artifacts, asks, and timing) instead of waiting for good work to be noticed automatically.

focus_points.label: When to push vs escalate tradeoffs
focus_points.reason: What calls she’s making on the hardest tradeoffs—when to push through, when to escalate to you, and how quickly she’s calibrating risk at Senior scope.
